name: hecateflow
description: Reusable, MCU-agnostic embedded-development skill system (13 skills): interactive workspace/target init, incremental module design & implementation, behavior-preserving refactor, deep review, and an always-on per-edit safety gate. v1.1 adds hardware-mapping headers with a single-source polarity/magnitude truth, a cross-platform lessons memory (record/recall/avoid/promote), tiered context-saving docs, auto-injection of rules/skills, clangd config management, multi-target IO-ownership planning, and relative-path discipline. Distilled from a real multi-core bare-metal C project.
